relationship_explanation: The complete retrieval/reranking capability spans SuperPromptProjector, smart_query_splitter, Retriever, RetrieverEmb, RetrieverSplade, rrf_merger and Reranker; retriever.py is not the sole owner.
The GHOST-versus-ragstream naming boundary applies across the retrieval package and requirements and has no single Python owner.
The Knowledge Management parent and sibling ownership boundary governs all retrieval and reranking components and cannot be assigned to retriever.py alone.
Query projection consumption, splitting, dense/SPLADE ranking, fusion, hydration, retrieval write-back and ColBERT reranking are implemented across several independent Python artifacts.
Retriever, RetrieverEmb, RetrieverSplade, rrf_merge, smart_query_splitter, Chunk hydration and Reranker reside in separate implementation artifacts.

ragstream/retrieval/retriever.py owns document retrieval orchestration, query projection consumption, dense-first execution, optional SPLADE invocation/bypass, hard embedding floor, hydration, metadata projection, diagnostics, and retrieval-stage SuperPrompt write-back.
